problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mycorrhizal. Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
